provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Banking Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: assigned to it under the Financial Intelligence Act (Cap. 08:07)
a company, incorporated in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, which is licensed under this Act to conduct banking business
the Bank of Botswana established under the Bank of Botswana Act
an institution incorporated in a country other than Botswana, and subject to a foreign jurisdiction, which is licensed to do banking business according to the laws of that country
assigned to it under the Financial Intelligence Act (Cap. 08:07)
assigned to it under the Proceeds and Instruments of Crime Act (Cap. 08:03)
any branch, office or agency (including a mobile agency) of a bank in Botswana, open to the public for the transaction of banking business
